title: rd-132328++
description: A mod for rd-132328 that makes it closer to later versions by adding multiple worlds, more blocks and modernized world saving.
body:
A mod for rd-132328 that makes it far more closer to a modern version as it can get by adding things like the ability to select blocks, modular block addition, sprinting, flying, game menu, multiple worlds and modernized world saving

**Please know that this mod is a jarmod because modrinth doesnt let me upload jarmods as jarmods.**

# KEYS AND STUFF
- wasd: move around
- mouse: look around
- left click: break block
- right click: place block
- plus and minus (not numpad): scroll the active block
- the non numpad number keys: set the active block
- F: start flying
- R: go to a random position in the world for every frame it is held down
- LEFT CONTROL: sprint
- LEFT SHIFT: if flying, moves you down
